revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:日鷲神社]]


'''Hiwashi Shrine''' (日鷲神社), '''Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine''' (天日鷲神社) are shrines of the {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} type (native name: {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ame-no-Hiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine|zh|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}). They enshrine the deity {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi God|de|Ame-no-Hiwashi Gott|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi God|qq=}} and belong to the {{ill|Ōtori Faith|de|Ōtori-Glauben|ja|大鳥信仰|zh|大鳥信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Faith|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} tradition. As a {{ill|Religious Corporation|de|Religiöse Körperschaft|ja|宗教法人|zh|宗教法人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Religious Corporation|1=religious corporation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7311343}}, there are 4 Hiwashi Shrines and 3 Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrines nationwide.
* {{ill|Hiwashi Shrine (Minamisoma)|de|Hiwashi Schrein (Minamisoma)|ja|日鷲神社 (南相馬市)|zh|日鷲神社 (Minamisoma)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwashi Shrine (Minamisoma)|1=Hiwashi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11510871}} – Fukushima Prefecture, Minamisoma City, Odaka Ward, Onaba Aza, Meiji Chinza.
* {{ill|Hiwashi Shrine (Tamura)|de|Hiwashi Schrein (Tamura)|ja|日鷲神社 (田村市)|zh|日鷲神社 (Tamura)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwashi Shrine (Tamura)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503293|1=Hiwashi Shrine (Tamura)}} – Fukushima Prefecture, Tamura City, Tokiha Town, Hotta Aza, Miyano-mae Chinza.
* {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (Tamura, Tsuro)|de|Ame-no-Hiwashi Schrein (Tamura, Tsuro)|ja|天日鷲神社 (田村市都路町)|zh|天日鷲神社 (Tamura, Tsuro)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (Tamura, Tsuro)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503296|1=Ame‑no‑Hiwashi Shrine (Tamura, Tsuro)}} – Fukushima Prefecture, Tamura City, Tsuro Town, Iwaizawa Aza, Hiranai Chinza.
* {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (Tamura, Tokiha)|de|Ame-no-Hiwashi Schrein (Tamura, Tokiha)|ja|天日鷲神社 (田村市常葉町)|zh|天日鷲神社 (Tamura, Tokiha)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (Tamura, Tokiha)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503297|1=Ame‑no‑Hiwashi Shrine (Tamura, Tokiha)}} – Fukushima Prefecture, Tamura City, Tokiha Town, Yamane Aza, Kamakurayama Chinza.
* {{ill|Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (Miharu)|de|Ame-no-Hiwashi Schrein (Miharu)|ja|天日鷲神社 (三春町)|zh|天日鷲神社 (Miharu)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (Miharu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503299|1=Ame‑no‑Hiwashi Shrine (Miharu)}} – Fukushima Prefecture, Tamura District, Miharu Town, Ōaza Tomizawa, Gobonki Chinza.
* {{ill|Hiwashi Shrine (Mito)|de|Hiwashi Schrein (Mito)|ja|日鷲神社 (水戸市)|zh|日鷲神社 (Mito)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwashi Shrine (Mito)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503300|1=Hiwashi Shrine (Mito)}} – Ibaraki Prefecture, Mito City, Kanaya Town, Chinza.
* {{ill|Hiwashi Shrine (Oyama)|de|Hiwashi Schrein (Oyama)|ja|日鷲神社 (小山市)|zh|日鷲神社 (Oyama)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwashi Shrine (Oyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503303|1=Hiwashi Shrine (Oyama)}} – Tochigi Prefecture, Oyama City, Ōaza Kayabashi, Chinza.

== See Also ==

* {{ill|Ōtori Shrine|de|Ōtori Schrein|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (disambiguation)|lt=Ōtori Shrine|lt=Ōtori Shrine (disambiguation)|lt_ja=大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|lt_de=Ōtori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|lt_zh=大鳥神社 (disambiguation)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtori Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ōwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (disambiguation)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65258950}}
* {{ill|Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi-no-Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (disambiguation)|lt=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|lt_ja=鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|lt_de=Washi-no-Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|lt_zh=鷲宮神社 (disambiguation)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65293873}}
* {{ill|Tori no Ichi|de|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|zh|酉の市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|1=Tori-no-Ichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11643942}}
